L1.head: transition metal ions (Mn and Co) incorporation into quasi-metal-organic frameworks (qMOFs)
L1.claim: Incorporation of Mn and Co into qMOFs enables enhanced catalytic efficiency in mimicking enzyme-like behavior

L1.head: enhanced catalytic efficiency
L1.claim: Enhanced catalytic efficiency causes increased ROS generation under physiological conditions

L1.head: increased ROS generation
L1.claim: Increased ROS generation leads to selective apoptosis in tumor cells

L1.head: increased ROS generation
L1.claim: Increased ROS generation inhibits cytotoxic effects on healthy cells
